betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dense & Vacuum Itemducts§f

§aControl item routing priority by manipulating calculated path length through the network!§f

§bDense Itemducts§f dramatically increase the path length behind them, lowering the priority of destinations on the other side. §bVacuum Itemducts§f dramatically decrease path length, raising priority. Both are crafted shapeless:

§6Recipes§f:
§b• Dense Itemduct§f: §e1× Itemduct§f + §e3× Lead Nugget§f → §e2× Dense Itemduct§f.
§b• Vacuum Itemduct§f: §e1× Itemduct§f + §e3× Silver Nugget§f → §e2× Vacuum Itemduct§f.

§6Routing Strategy§f:
- Place a §bVacuum Itemduct§f right after a chest to make items route there first.
- Use §bDense Itemducts§f to deprioritize overflow destinations so primary buffers fill before secondary ones.
- Vacuum + Dense together let you build deterministic item routing without filters.

§eTip§f: You can chain multiple Vacuum Itemducts to amplify the priority boost. Two vacuum ducts in series behave as if a much shorter path exists between the source and the destination.
